description: Golden routing prompts for Meridian Gateway resolver evaluation. Expected agent sets reflect realistic multi-agent banking queries — a portfolio assistant that also surfaces related context (e.g. settlements when showing holdings) is better than one that narrows to a single capability.

prompts.prompt: Show me the complete picture for the Whitman Family Office account — holdings, performance, risk profile, settlement status, and cash position
Give me a full overview of the Whitman relationship — what are they invested in, how has it performed, any upcoming corporate actions and open settlements?
What are the current holdings for the Whitman Family Office?
prompts.description: Holdings — related: pending settlements affect positions, performance for context

prompts.prompt: Show me the portfolio allocation for this client relationship
What is this account invested in? Give me the position breakdown
prompts.description: Position breakdown — holdings + cash context + performance

prompts.prompt: Current portfolio positions for the relationship
prompts.description: Positions — holdings + custody + cash + goals context

prompts.prompt: How has the Whitman portfolio performed year to date?
prompts.description: YTD performance — performance needs holdings and goal context

prompts.prompt: What are the year-to-date returns and P&L for this client?
Quarterly performance of the Whitman account
How has this relationship performed over the past 12 months? Show me total return and benchmark comparison
Is the Whitman family on track to meet their financial goals?
prompts.description: Goal planning — needs performance + holdings for current state

prompts.prompt: Show me the financial plan status for this client relationship
Are the client goals funded? What is the goal progress?
What is the risk profile for this client?
Are there any concentration risk flags on the Whitman portfolio?
prompts.description: Concentration risk flags — needs full context

prompts.prompt: How concentrated is this portfolio and what is the client's stated risk tolerance?
prompts.description: Risk tolerance and concentration — risk + positions

prompts.prompt: Are there any pending or failed settlements for the Whitman account?
prompts.description: Settlement status — settlements affect cash and positions

prompts.prompt: Show me the settlement status for recent trades in this relationship
Any failed settlements or breaks for this account?
What is the current cash balance and projected cash for this relationship?
Show me the cash management position for this account
prompts.description: Cash management with custody and holdings

prompts.prompt: How much liquidity does the Whitman Family Office have available?
Are there any upcoming corporate actions for this relationship's holdings?
Show me pending dividends and corporate events for this account
Show me the custody positions and holdings by custodian for this relationship
What does the custodian show for this account?
prompts.description: Custodian view with holdings and performance

prompts.prompt: What is the NAV for fund FND-7781?
prompts.description: NAV query — fund-keyed, should select nav agent only

prompts.prompt: Show me the net asset value as of today for the fund
I need to review the Whitman account ahead of a client meeting — give me holdings, performance, and any risk concerns
Is the Whitman account ready for end of quarter? Check settlements, cash, and corporate actions
Give me the full wealth overview and servicing status for this relationship
Risk and performance review for the Whitman Family Office
prompts.description: Risk and performance — risk + performance + context

prompts.prompt: Show me holdings, performance, goals, risk profile, settlements, cash and corporate actions
What is the Whitman Family Office invested in? Show me positions, risk, and performance
prompts.description: Wealth overview — should NOT include nav

prompts.prompt: Portfolio overview for the relationship — holdings and allocation
